---
title: A Survey of FPGA-Based Robotic Computing
author:
- Zishen Wan
- Bo Yu
- Thomas Yuang Li
- Jie Tang
- Yuhao Zhu
- Yu Wang
- Arijit Raychowdhury
- Shaoshan Liu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/cas21-fpga.pdf
journ: IEEE CAS-M
year: 2021
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
award: Invited Paper for Special Issue on FPGA
pub_number: 48
---
